relations.note: Both govern CTA sections; spec sets button styling, cardinality limits count.

quotes: Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**
image/text split (≈40/60)
Email Canvas & Grid
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).

rules.intent: Ensure seamless section assembly and responsive collapse.
rules.rule_text: Email body is a fixed, centered 600px canvas (size.canvas.email_body_width = 600px); sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly. At the mobile breakpoint (breakpoint.mobile = 480px) all multi-column layouts collapse to single column. The internal grid uses a 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (ratio.grid.image_text ≈40/60).

quotes: Section side padding: 24px
Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px**
Heading → body gap: 16px.

**Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Consistent spacing rhythm enabling zero-gap section assembly.
rules.rule_text: All sections use 24px left/right side padding (section.padding.sides = 24px) consistently — this is what makes assembly seamless; full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px but text within them still respects the 24px insets. Vertical rhythm is on an 8px base unit (spacing.base.unit = 8px) with all padding/margins as multiples of 8. Each section owns its own top AND bottom internal padding of 32px (section.padding.top_bottom = 32px) with no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking. Gaps: heading→body 16px (spacing.gap.heading_body), paragraph→paragraph 16px, body→callout/CTA 24px (spacing.gap.body_callout), image→caption 8px.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height**
corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

rules.intent: Enforce approved, accessible CTA button treatment.
rules.rule_text: Primary CTA buttons use a Brand Blue background (cta.button.fill = #00529b) with White text (cta.button.label.color = #ffffff), Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px (cta.button.padding), and a fully rounded pill corner radius of 24px (cta.button.radius) echoing the rounded brand aesthetic. Minimum touch target is 48px height (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas). Secondary CTA uses a White background, a 2px Brand Blue border (cta.button.secondary.border), and Brand Blue text, with the same metrics.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Avoid competing calls to action within a section.
rules.rule_text: One primary CTA per section maximum.
